title: After the Japanese Derby: Among the Heartening Voices

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle, Mejiro Ryan emerges
victorious at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even amid the raucous support for the new Derby
champion, there are those in the audience who
cheer for Ines Fujin, who ran as she wanted to,
and gave the race all she had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summoning the last of her strength, Ines Fujin
gives the crowd a huge wave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment she returns to the waiting room,
however, Ines Fujin collapses to the floor...
